items.text: let's talk about path tracing and using the path trace renderer 让我们来谈谈路径追踪和使用路径追踪渲染器 and everything you need to know to get up and running to use this system 以及你需要了解的一切，以便开始并使用该系统 Now something to note 现在需要注意的是 path tracing does not mean the same thing as ray tracing 路径追踪和光线追踪并不意味着同一件事 They are similar 它们相似 but they are not the same thing 但它们并不相同 So what is the difference between these two 那么这两者之间有什么区别呢 And what is ray tracing 光线追踪是什么呢 Let's start there 让我们从那里开始 So ray tracing is a system where we're tracing light rays and have them bouncing around our 光线追踪是一个系统，我们追踪光线并使其在我们的场景中弹射 So I'm using this pool table as an example 所以我以这张台球桌作为例子 In ray tracing 在光线追踪中 this method is faster than path tracing because we're shooting out a light 这种方法比路径追踪更快，因为我们发射了一束光线 ray like we would with our cue ball here 就像我们在这里使用球杆一样 We're having it bounce around our scene 我们让它在场景中弹射 but as soon as it hits one object 但是一旦它碰到一个物体 typically that 通常 ray tracing will stop and not gather any more information 光线追踪将停止并且不再收集任何信息 So this is used in video games or deferred renderers to improve the lighting quality 因此，这在视频游戏或延迟渲染器中用于提高光照质量 We shoot our rays once 我们发射一次光线 we have them hit one object 我们让它们击中一个物体 but it's far from perfect because in real life 但它远非完美，因为在现实生活中 light continues to bounce around 光线会持续弹射 after that first contact 在第一次接触之后 And that's why we use path tracing 这就是为什么我们使用路径追踪 So path tracing follows the entire light path to capture even more bounce lighting 因此，路径追踪会跟随整个光线路径以捕捉更多的弹射光照 And it'll also cast out additional rays and see what results they would get 它还会发射额外的光线并观察它们会得到什么结果 The point is we're shooting a lot more samples into our scene to get a much more realistic 关键是我们在场景中投射了更多样本，以获得更加逼真的效果 So that's why path tracing is used in visual effects for its photorealistic accuracy 这就是为什么路径追踪在视觉效果中被用于其逼真的精确度。 But it takes much longer to render 但渲染时间要长得多。 And if you don't let your renders continue long enough 如果你不让渲染持续足够长的时间 then they'll just turn out very 那么它们最终会变得非常 noisy and that noise might prevent it from being usable in the end 嘈杂，这种噪声可能会导致最终无法使用 So path tracing is not real time 所以路径追踪不是实时的 And I personally use Unreal Engine because it is a real time engine 而我个人使用虚幻引擎是因为它是一个实时引擎 So I have a differing view on this than most 所以我的观点与大多数人不同 But typically when we're using the path tracer 但通常当我们使用路径追踪器时 I like to use the path tracer as a quote unquote 我喜欢将路径追踪器用作引号引号 ground truth render 真实渲染结果 So we know what reality should look like 这样我们就知道现实应该是什么样子的 We can set up our lights in the scene and use this path tracing preview to understand 我们可以在场景中设置灯光，并使用这个路径追踪预览来理解 what it should look like 它应该是什么样子的 But in the end 但最终 it's so much faster to work with the dynamic lighting system by using 使用动态照明系统工作速度要快得多 Lumen and Unreal's deferred lighting system Lumen和虚幻引擎的延迟照明系统 So I find the faster workflow is to use this 所以我发现更快的工作流程是使用这个 get a grasp of your scene 掌握你的场景 render out a couple 渲染出几个 still frames or even just screenshots to see what this would look like in real life 静帧甚至只是截图，以了解这在现实生活中会是什么样子 And then we'll go ahead and match our lighting in the deferred render to the path tracing 然后我们将继续在延迟渲染中匹配我们的照明到路径追踪 this isn't for everything 这并不适用于所有情况 And if you build up your entire scene using the path tracer 如果你使用路径追踪器构建整个场景 there's really no problem 那就没有问题 But it kind of negates the whole reason of using Unreal 但这有点否定了使用虚幻引擎的整个原因 We're using Unreal because it's so much faster because we can create in real time 我们使用虚幻引擎是因为它速度更快，因为我们可以实时创建 And by using the path tracer 通过使用路径追踪器 we're getting rid of all of the advantages of using Unreal 我们正在摒弃使用虚幻引擎的所有优势 So just keep that in mind 所以请记住这一点 And the path tracer is really helpful as a ground truth render for baked lighting 路径追踪器对于烘焙光照来说非常有帮助，作为真实渲染的基准 if you use the GPU lightmass plugin 如果你使用GPU Lightmass插件 you can now bake your lighting significantly 你现在可以显著加速烘焙光照 faster on your GPU 在你的GPU上更快地进行烘焙 And it's using the same exact calculations in the GPU lightmass as you're seeing in the 而且在GPU Lightmass中使用的计算与你在路径追踪器中看到的完全相同 path tracer 路径追踪器 So you should get a nearly identical result between the two 因此，你应该得到两者之间几乎相同的结果 the path tracer does finally support almost all the rendering features now in 5.2. 路径追踪器终于在5.2版本中支持几乎所有的渲染功能。 Nanite now works in 5.2. Nanite现在在5.2版本中可用。 Emissive materials as well 发光材质也是如此 Decals are new in Unreal 5.1. 贴花在虚幻引擎5.1中是新的功能。 And that's a super helpful thing 这是非常有帮助的事情 That's something you can't really do in other 3D softwares is use decals in a path traced 这是其他3D软件中无法实现的，即在路径追踪中使用贴花 So that's one real big advantage of using Unreal is when you want to use decals 因此，使用虚幻引擎的一个真正大的优势就是当你想使用贴花时 Glass can be very accurate when using the path tracer 使用路径追踪器时，玻璃可以非常准确 although it takes a lot of time 尽管这需要很长时间 to get rid of all the noise from glass 消除玻璃的所有噪点 we can now separate our diffuse and specular lighting 现在我们可以分离散射光和镜面光 We can have indirect lighting and have proper offline AOVs 我们可以获得间接光照并拥有适当的离线AOV It is now supported 现在已经支持了 That doesn't mean that it's very efficient to use these 这并不意味着使用它们非常高效 but it now is fully capable and 但现在它已经完全具备能力，并且 something that didn't exist in the engine before the latest version 这是之前版本中不存在的东西 And it also uses volumetric fog 它还使用体积雾 You can use that inside of the path tracer 你可以在路径追踪器内使用它 But I would say again 但我想再说一遍 let's think of why we're using the path tracer 让我们思考一下为什么我们要使用路径追踪器 At the end of the day 归根结底 we're using the path tracer for very highly realistic results 我们使用路径追踪器来获得非常逼真的结果 But I find that you'll get a very 但我发现你会得到一个非常 very accurate looking result by using 非常精确的结果通过使用 the deferred renderer and you can render volumetric fog by itself 延迟渲染器，你可以单独渲染体积雾 We kind of walked through how to render out AOVs so far 到目前为止，我们已经介绍了如何渲染AOV So using that same method 所以使用同样的方法 we could isolate our volumetric fog and render that by itself 我们可以将体积雾隔离出来并单独渲染 In your post-process volume 在你的后期处理体积中 in your path tracing settings 在你的路径追踪设置中 just scroll down and at the 只需向下滚动并在 bottom of the lighting components 灯光组件的底部 disable volume 禁用体积 And I'll show you a specific example of how we can combine path traced beauty lighting 我将给你展示一个具体的例子，说明我们如何结合路径追踪美丽的光照 on our characters and volumetric fog from the deferred render later on 以及稍后从延迟渲染中得到的角色和体积雾 But I would not recommend trying to use volumetric fog 但我不建议尝试使用体积雾 It just takes way more time for no clear benefit 这只会花费更多的时间而没有明显的好处 I just want to include this slide so that you can see this 我只是想包含这个幻灯片，这样你就可以看到这个 this if you need to 如果你需要的话 But to enable path tracing in your project settings 但是要在项目设置中启用路径追踪 you'll need to enable all of these 你需要启用所有这些 different features 不同的功能 You can just search for any of these 你可以搜索其中任何一个 So just search the end 所以只需搜索结尾 enable path tracing 启用路径追踪 enable support hardware ray tracing 启用硬件光线追踪支持 And that'll enable it in your scene 这将在你的场景中启用它 You might have to restart your engine 你可能需要重新启动引擎 but that'll enable it 但那样会启用它 And for system requirements 而且对于系统要求 you need a Windows 10 or later and you'll need an NVIDIA graphics 你需要 Windows 10 或更高版本，还需要 NVIDIA 显卡 card to make this work 才能使其正常工作 it's just not supported 就不被支持 This does not work on Mac as of yet 目前在 Mac 上不可用 And now let's talk about getting good quality renders out of our path tracer 现在让我们来讨论如何从路径追踪器中获得高质量的渲染结果 And so if we take our Raya 01 scene and just turn this into path tracing mode 如果我们将我们的 Raya 01 场景切换到路径追踪模式 a bit of a bug on Echo's model 在 Echo 的模型上有一点小问题 Her eyes go white 她的眼睛变白了 which is obviously insanely creepy 这显然是非常恐怖的 But it's not because the eyes don't work in path tracer 但这不是因为眼睛在路径追踪器中不起作用 It's because we have to hide one of the shaders that only works in real time 而是因为我们必须隐藏一个只在实时模式下工作的着色器 So if you click on Echo and then go to the skeletal mesh component inside of the blueprint 所以如果你点击 Echo，然后进入蓝图中的骨骼网格组件 and then scroll down to element 19 and 21 然后滚动到元素 19 和 21 normally this eye blend is what will show 通常这个眼睛混合会显示出来 up and cause our eyes to look white 并导致我们的眼睛变白 But if you just swap this material out 但如果你只是替换掉这个材质 if you just click on eye blend and search for 如果你只是点击眼睛混合并搜索 you'll see that there's an M hide material and we can assign that to material 19 and 你会看到有一个 M hide 材质，我们可以将其分配给材质 19 和 material 21. 材质 21 And that's how you fix Echo's eyes in path tracer 这就是你在路径追踪器中修复 Echo 眼睛的方法 And basically it's going to shoot out our light rays into the scene and slowly resolve 基本上它会将光线投射到场景中并逐渐解决 our lighting over time 随着时间的推移，我们的照明效果 skin is going to take a lot of time to render because we have a subsurface model here 由于我们这里有一个次表面模型，皮肤渲染需要很长时间 and it's doing all those calculations 并且进行了所有这些计算 So we should get a better looking result in the end 所以最终我们应该能够得到一个更好的效果 but you can already see just how 但你已经可以看到 long this is taking for just a single frame 这只是一个单帧，时间很长 It's just so much slower than the deferred renders from Unreal 它比Unreal的延迟渲染要慢得多 So feel free to try this out and see what kind of results you can get 所以随时可以尝试一下，看看能得到什么样的结果 But the use case I'm finding most useful is rendering out characters path traced with nothing 但我发现最有用的用例是什么都没有的角色路径追踪渲染出来 else in the scene 场景中的其他物体 So I'll just hide all the other geometry in the scene 所以我只会隐藏场景中的其他几何体 render out the characters 渲染角色 then the backgrounds and the volumetric fog 再渲染背景和体积雾 I'll render out through using the deferred 我会通过使用延迟渲染来渲染出来 So I'll just have two different movie render queues 所以我会有两个不同的电影渲染队列 two different sequences set up 设置了两个不同的序列 and disabling those two features 以及禁用这两个功能 And that way I can get the best quality and speed from both of the renders 这样我就可以从这两种渲染中获得最佳的质量和速度 But just to repeat myself again 但是再重复一遍 what is the real reason we're using the path tracer 我们使用路径追踪器的真正原因是什么 In this specific scene 在这个特定的场景中 I don't see any clear benefit to using the path tracer whatsoever 我完全看不到使用路径追踪器的任何明显好处 I think if you spent the time tweaking with path tracer 我认为如果你花时间调整路径追踪器 waiting for your renders 等待渲染完成 tweaks again 再次调整 changing out your render settings 更改渲染设置 updating it 更新它 waiting for the noise 等待噪点 your render settings so that you get a less noisy version 调整渲染设置，以获得较少噪点的版本 every single one of those steps 每一个步骤 takes a very long time 需要很长时间 And I just don't see that ever adding up to making a better image faster 我只是觉得这永远也无法加快制作更好的图像的速度 I think it's much easier to just tweak your lighting in real time 我觉得实时调整灯光会更容易一些。 But anyway 不管怎样 I said my piece on that finally 我终于说完了我的意见 I'll shut up 我闭嘴了 But let's talk about quality settings 不过，我们来谈谈质量设置吧 So the two areas that you can actually upgrade your quality settings when you're using the 所以当你使用时，你实际上可以在两个方面提升你的质量设置 path tracer are actually going to be in your post process volume settings 路径追踪器实际上会在你的后期处理音量设置中 So if you scroll down here 所以如果你在这里向下滚动 there's going to be a path tracer dropdown at the bottom 底部会有一个路径追踪器下拉菜单 And here we have maximum bounces 这里是最大反弹次数 So this is the maximum amount of bounces that light path will continue to travel 这是光线路径将继续行进的最大反弹次数 So you can lower this and it'll shorten your render times 所以你可以降低这个值，它会缩短渲染时间 but you'll get less quality 但你会得到更低的质量 less accurate results 结果不太准确 samples per pixel is the main slider you should be moving up and down to 每像素采样是你应该上下移动的主要滑块 adjust your final quality settings 调整最终的质量设置 You want to strike a balance between low render times by setting lower sample counts 你想通过设置较低的采样数量来在低渲染时间之间取得平衡 So I like to start my samples per pixel at 128 and keep doubling it until I achieve the 所以我喜欢将每像素采样从128开始，然后不断加倍，直到达到 quality I need for my final render 我最终渲染所需的质量 This filter width is just related to anti aliasing settings 这个滤波器宽度只与抗锯齿设置有关 You'll probably never need to tweak that 你可能永远不需要调整它 And if you want to use proper depth of field by using reference depth of field 如果你想使用参考景深来使用适当的景深 now has the proper edges that you would expect 现在有了你期望的正确边缘 And then underneath all of that 然后在所有这些之下 we have our lighting AOVs 我们有我们的灯光AOV So from here we can manually enable and disable some of these 所以从这里我们可以手动启用和禁用其中一些 So I'm just going to check all of these on 所以我打算将所有这些都勾选上 And for an example 举个例子 I could disable certain rendering features 我可以禁用某些渲染功能 so I could just disable 所以我可以禁用它 our volumes and now it won't render our fog 我们的体积，现在它不会渲染我们的雾了 And now I can disable the diffuse so that I only can see the specular reaction in our 现在我可以禁用漫反射，这样我只能看到我们的镜面反射 And just so you know 只是让你知道 this is unfortunately the only way to see proper specular only 不幸的是，这是唯一的方法来看到正确的镜面反射 Whenever you're trying to view specular any other way 无论你如何尝试查看镜面反射 like if you look at the reflections 比如你看看反射 we're not getting that same result that we're seeing in that specular only version of our 我们得不到我们在镜面反射版本中看到的相同结果 path tracer 路径追踪器 So this really is the only way 所以这真的是唯一的方法 So if you're trying to build out a pure old school visual effects pipeline by using the 所以如果你想通过使用纯正的老式视觉效果流程来构建 path tracer inside of Unreal 虚幻引擎中的路径追踪器 this is the way to get these renders out 这是获取这些渲染结果的方法 It's going to be inside this post process volume 它将位于这个后期处理体积内 But you can do the same thing 但你可以做同样的事情 We could disable our specular and just get our diffuse 我们可以禁用镜面反射，只获取漫反射 And then we would recombine these renders later on 然后我们会在后面重新组合这些渲染结果 Now unfortunately 现在不幸的是 we cannot keyframe these 我们无法对它们进行关键帧设置 which means we can't access them inside of 这意味着我们无法在内部访问它们 But I'll leave a link to the path tracing documentation underneath this 但我会在下面留下路径追踪文档的链接 If you want to build a rendering pipeline 如果你想构建一个渲染流程 there are blueprints that you can create that 有一些蓝图可以创建 are listed in the documentation to enable or disable these based on your movie render 在文档中列出了根据电影渲染的需要启用或禁用这些功能 queue config 队列配置 But that's beyond the scope of this course 但这超出了本课程的范围 So for now 所以现在 just know that all of these are here 只要知道这些都在这里 This is how you access these different AOVs is through this lighting components dropdown 这就是通过这个照明组件下拉菜单访问这些不同的AOV的方式 And then from here 然后从这里开始 the other way that we can control our quality settings are going 我们可以通过其他方式来控制质量设置 to be through our anti-aliasing settings inside of movie render queue 通过电影渲染队列中的抗锯齿设置来实现 So if I was going to load up our nuke render and convert this nuke render into a path traced 所以如果我要加载我们的核爆渲染并将其转换为路径追踪 what I would do is I would add in the path tracer 我会添加路径追踪器 I would delete the deferred render 我会删除延迟渲染 And now we can change the quality and the noisiness of our render by using this anti-aliasing 现在我们可以通过使用这个抗锯齿来改变渲染的质量和噪点 So you'll have to increase your anti-aliasing samples to reduce noise inside of movie render 所以你需要增加抗锯齿样本以减少电影渲染中的噪点 And the total number of samples here is going to be the result of your spatial sample count 这里的总样本数将是您空间样本计数的结果 multiplied by your temporal sample count 乘以您的时间样本计数 So here we have eight times four 所以这里我们有八乘以四 meaning we have 32 samples 意味着我们有32个样本 But this still may be a noisy result 但这可能仍然是一个有噪点的结果 But if instead we use 16 spatial samples and one temporal sample 但如果我们使用16个空间样本和一个时间样本 it would actually take 实际上会花费 less time to render and it may give us a better result 渲染时间更短，可能会给我们更好的结果 Now this is something you do have to try 现在这是你必须尝试的东西 but as a rule of thumb 但作为一个经验法则 you're going to want 你会想要 to use spatial samples only when you're rendering stills 当你渲染静态图像时只使用空间样本 And you'll probably want to use temporal samples only if you're rendering sequences 如果你渲染序列图像，你可能只想使用时间样本 Now definitely give these a shot 现在一定要试试这些 try out different combinations 尝试不同的组合 But I would start with these settings 但我会从这些设置开始 start at 8 从8开始 I tried doubling your sample count each time so you're making a difference 我尝试每次加倍样本数量，这样你就会有所不同 And also keep note of how long your renders are taking because as you increase these sample 还要注意渲染所需的时间，因为随着样本的增加 it's going to dramatically increase your render time 这将大大增加渲染时间 But it will give you a better result 但它将给你更好的结果 Now the Path Tracer is known for having fireflies or single pixel noise that is just super bright 现在，路径追踪器以其具有非常明亮的火星或单像素噪点而闻名 Sometimes the values are over 100 有时候值会超过100 so they can really bug out your scene 所以它们可能会破坏你的场景 And this can be made worse when we have Bloom enabled because it will take that really 当我们启用了Bloom时，这可能会变得更糟，因为它会将那个非常亮的像素点带入 bright pixel and then add Bloom on top of it 亮像素点，然后在其上添加Bloom So typically when you're using Path Tracer 因此，通常在使用路径追踪器时 you'll want to disable Bloom by setting your 你会想通过将你的Bloom设置为 intensity to zero 强度为零来禁用Bloom Now denoising can help this 现在去噪可以帮助解决这个问题 And there's a couple things we should know about denoising 关于去噪，有几件事情我们应该知道 We have our denoiser enabled here in our post-process volume settings 我们在后处理体积设置中启用了去噪器 One thing that you have to know is you have to have this plugin enabled 你必须知道的一件事是你必须启用这个插件 So if I go to my plugins menu and type in denoise 所以，如果我进入我的插件菜单并输入去噪 we have two different denoises 我们有两种不同的去噪方式 We have open image denoise 我们有开放式图像去噪 which is the default 这是默认的 And then we have a beta version of NVIDIA's denoiser 然后我们有NVIDIA的去噪器的测试版本 So if I wanted to 所以，如果我想要的话 I could just simply uncheck this if I wanted to remove the denoiser 如果我想要移除去噪器，我只需简单地取消选中它 And from here 从这里开始 you'll have to wait for this red progress bar to completely finish before 你必须等待这个红色进度条完全完成，然后 your denoise to image is going to kick in 你的去噪图像将开始工作 Lower down your samples per pixel until you get a reasonable time 降低每像素样本数，直到你获得合理的时间 And at least from there 至少从那里开始 you can see what your denoise render looks like 你可以看到你的去噪渲染的效果 So keep this as low as possible 所以尽量保持这个尽可能低 but you'll have to just keep increasing it until you 但是你必须继续增加它，直到你 get the quality that you want 获得你想要的质量 In a situation like this 在这种情况下 128 might look okay on a still frame 在静止画面上，128可能看起来还可以 but if you play this back 但是如果播放回放 in a sequence 在一个序列中 you get a lot of chattering in the areas where we have a lot of geometry 在有很多几何图形的区域，会出现很多噪点 And because of
